creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
The last remaining issues have been cleared up and/or marked as broken with Ruby 2.0. There are now only 2 things remaining before Ruby 2.0 can become default:

- Close bug 189646 for Ruby 1.9, Ruby 2.0 and Ruby 2.1. I've got a patch for 1.9 now that I think is correct. Once I can find time to do the same changes for 2.0 and 2.1, then I can commit it.
- Update devel/ruby-gems to the latest and greatest. According to gem authors, using ruby 1.8.x with Ruby 2.0 or newer isn't a good idea and may not work well. This is something I haven't started on yet.
